message:
fix: Pod Brothers game shows game over immediately on start (#3725)

The game had two issues causing instant game-over:

1. A goomba enemy spawned at the exact same position as the player
   (col 1, row 7 = tile coordinates 32,224), so even with spawn
   invincibility the player was trapped in an enemy hitbox. Moved
   the goomba to col 3 to give the player clear space at spawn.

2. Life-loss logic called setGameState('lost') and initLevel() as
   side-effects inside setLives() state updater functions. React 18
   can double-invoke updaters (especially in StrictMode), making the
   game state transitions unpredictable on retry. Refactored to use
   a livesRef that tracks lives synchronously, keeping state updaters
   pure and side-effect-free.

Also cancels any in-flight animation frame in startGame() to prevent
stale game-loop callbacks from interfering with a fresh game.

Closes #3716

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
